$meta.name: Research & Innovation — Design System
$meta.description: Design tokens for the Research & Innovation technology-intelligence dashboards. One accent at a time; in a technology-focused card, override `color.accent` and `color.accentTint` with that technology's hue.
changelog: 1.2.0 — Increased reading-text sizes for legibility: body 13.5->15px, bodySmall 12->14px, label 10->11.5px, caption 10.5->12px; overlapping lede (->15px) and figure (->14px) followed the shared values. Applied across all dashboards.
1.1.0 — Added the official SVG line-icon set: 5 technology icons + 10 industry icons (24x24, currentColor).
1.0.0 — Display typeface changed from Bricolage Grotesque to Montserrat; brand ampersand is now upright (font-style: normal) instead of italic.

ink3.role: muted text, labels, captions, axis ticks

tintDefault.role: accent at 14% — chip fills, glows, focus shadow

onAccent.role: text/icon placed on a solid accent fill

accent.note: In a focused card, set accent = technology hue and tint = hexA(hue, 0.14).

Descriptive AI.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><rect x="6.4" y="12.5" width="2.6" height="5.5" rx="0.7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><rect x="10.7" y="9.5" width="2.6" height="8.5" rx="0.7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" opacity="0.5"/><rect x="15" y="6.5" width="2.6" height="11.5" rx="0.7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><path d="M6 9.7l3.6-3.1 3 2 3.9-4.4"/><circle cx="16.5" cy="4.2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>

Blockchain & Decentralized.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.4"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.4"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.4" opacity="0.5"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.4" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M10 6.5h4M6.5 10v4M17.5 10v4M10 17.5h4"/></svg>

Physical AI & Robotics.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="4" y="7.5" width="16" height="11" rx="2.5"/><circle cx="12" cy="4" r="1.3" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><path d="M12 5.3v2.2"/><circle cx="9" cy="13" r="1.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="15" cy="13" r="1.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><path d="M2.5 12v3M21.5 12v3"/></svg>

Quantum Computing.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.8" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><ellipse cx="12" cy="12" rx="10" ry="4.3"/><ellipse cx="12" cy="12" rx="10" ry="4.3" transform="rotate(60 12 12)"/><ellipse cx="12" cy="12" rx="10" ry="4.3" transform="rotate(120 12 12)"/></svg>

display.use: headlines, section titles, metrics, brand lockup

mono.use: labels, eyebrows, figures, axis ticks, tabular numbers

typography.numericFeature: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums (apply to all mono figures)

brandAmpersand.note: Upright (NOT italic). Coloured with the active accent.

shadow.highlightGlow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, var(--accent-tint), transparent 70%)
shadow.pageBackdrop: radial-gradient(1100px 600px at 12% -8%, rgba(245,166,35,0.07), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(900px 600px at 100% 0%, rgba(74,144,217,0.07), transparent 50%)

line.rule: All lines keep their full technology colour. Emphasise the focused technology with greater borderWidth and visible points; others stay full-colour but thinner with no points. In the all-technology view use the neutral weights.

dataViz.indexConvention: Leaderboards and bar rankings are indexed so the leader = 100 and others scale proportionally (value / max * 100, one decimal, '100' for the leader). Absolute counts are not displayed; state this in a caption.

trend.rule: N = positions gained/lost vs the prior-period rank; colour by semantic up/down/flat.

iconography.style: Single line-icon family on a 24x24 grid. 1.5-1.7px strokes, round caps/joins, drawn in currentColor with selective solid fills (fill="currentColor") and reduced-opacity secondary shapes (opacity 0.35-0.6).
iconography.color: currentColor — set via the element's color; technology icons use the technology hue, industry icons inherit the active accent.
iconography.flags: Country flags use Unicode regional-indicator emoji; fall back to the white-flag glyph.

iconography.note: Industry icons are not colour-coded; they take whichever accent is active on the surface (default amber, or the focus technology's hue).
